_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Engineer Design Test Plan
summary: This Data Item Description provides format and content instructions for an Engineer Design Test Plan, which describes acceptable performance levels, collects design data, and confirms component compatibility.
description_purpose: The Engineer Design Test (EDT) Plan describes the acceptable level of performance for a system. The purpose of the EDT Plan is to collect design data, confirm preliminary concepts and determine compatability of components.
application_interrelationship: This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format and content preparation instructions for the data product generated by the specific and discrete task requirement as delineated in the contract.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: General.
preparation_instructions.content: The EDT Plan shall demonstrate confidence that areas of coverage are adequate and that data generated shall assure that objectives of performance can be validated. Maximum use of Government owned facilities and instruments shall be stipulated.

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: The EDT Plan format shall be contractor selected. Unless effective presentation would be degraded, the initially used format arrangement shall be used for all subsequent submissions.

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: The EDT Plan shall describe the methods and techniques for obtaining data and shall establish and explain the standards, tests, associated analysis and other means that shall constitute adequate proof, upon completion of the development phase, that an acceptable level of performance can be achieved by the system. It shall identify tests to be conducted for determining compliance with stated technical and operational military requirements and the individual equipment specifications.

children.title: The EDT Plan shall contain the following:
Description of test equipment to be used
List of required Government owned equipment and facilities.
